query:
SELECT c.name as pais, COUNT(*) as times
FROM teams t
JOIN countries c ON t.countryId = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY times DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT c.name as pais, COUNT(*) as times
FROM teams t
JOIN countries c ON t.countryId = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY times DESC;
